# balena_release_tag (Resource)

Manages a tag on a Balena release.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `release_id` (Number) ID of the release.
- `tag_key` (String) Tag key.
- `value` (String) Tag value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier.
